raw_consumer_statement: For the past 60days I have attempted to dispute multiple times a charge that appears on my credit card. I have submitted hard evidence that I do not owe the amount in question and the merchant has not showed any evidence that I owe the funds requested. They had asked for multiple items including hotel name, dates of stay, cancellation policy, type of room, etc I have supplied everything they had requested in their rebuttal and my dispute keeps greeting closed and I keep having to reopen it as no one is actually looking at the hard evidence of what I sent in. The merchant is clearly violating AMEX policy and federal and state laws with their false and misleading false advertising guarantees they promise ( low price guarantee )
